name: Coverage: New Event dialog Weekly Recurrence control
description: Create event via New Event dialog, set Repeats/Recurrence to Weekly, Save Event, verify event on calendar. Do not delete.

planSteps.description: Type demo@timeora.app into the email field
Type TimeoraDemo123! into the password field
Click Sign in and wait for the dashboard
Type TS Dialog Weekly into the Event title field
In the Repeats / Recurrence select control, choose Weekly
Wait 4 seconds for the calendar to refresh
Verify a calendar event titled TS Dialog Weekly is visible on the weekly calendar
